ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campsites" (
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campsite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campsite */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the campsite is located */,
  "num_campsites" INTEGER /* Number of campsites available */,
  "seasons" TEXT /* Seasonal operations of the campsite (e.g., April 1st through October 31) */,
  "photo" TEXT /* File path to the photo of the campsite */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the campsite */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the campsite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campsite */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the campsite */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the campsite */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the campsite (e.g., open, closed, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campsite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campsites_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_map")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_map" TEXT /* Map of the state (e.g., WV Map, VI Map) */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "tourism_rating" INTEGER /* Tourism rating of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite being reserved */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "checkin_date" TEXT /* Check-in date of the reservation */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Check-out date of the reservation */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "num_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the reservation */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the reservation */,
  "num_infants" INTEGER /* Number of infants in the reservation */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the customer */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, partially paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refunds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
